input.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    l.rhatUUID AS uuid,
    sf.Id,

    l.employeeNumber AS ldap_employeenumber,

    mgr_sf.Id AS ldap_manager,

    SUBSTR(TRIM(l.rhatJobTitle), 1, 80) AS ldap_businesscardtitle,

    l.c AS ldap_countrycode,

    l.Title AS ldap_title,

    sf.Business_Card_Title__c,
    sf.EmployeeNumber,
    sf.ManagerId,
    sf.CountryCode,
    sf.Title,

    l.LastModifiedDate

FROM ldap_users_staging l

LEFT JOIN ldap_users_staging mgr_ldap
    ON LOWER(TRIM(l.Manager)) = LOWER(TRIM(mgr_ldap.Mail))

LEFT JOIN sf_users_staging mgr_sf
    ON mgr_ldap.rhatUUID = mgr_sf.Red_Hat_UUID__c

INNER JOIN sf_users_staging sf
    ON l.rhatUUID = sf.Red_Hat_UUID__c

WHERE l.rhatUUID IS NOT NULL
  AND sf.Red_Hat_UUID__c IS NOT NULL
  AND sf.Red_Hat_UUID__c <> ''
  AND sf.Id <> ''

  AND (
        l.employeeNumber IS NOT NULL
     OR l.Title IS NOT NULL
     OR mgr_sf.Id IS NOT NULL
     OR l.rhatJobTitle IS NOT NULL
     OR l.c IS NOT NULL
  )

input.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT
        urtl.UUID AS uuid,
        sf.Id,

       urtl.manager AS urtl_manager,

       urtl.CountryCode AS urtl_countrycode,

        urtl.Title AS urtl_title,

        sf.ManagerId,
        sf.CountryCode,
        sf.Title,
        urtl.LastModifiedDate,
        sf.EmployeeNumber,
        sf.Business_Card_Title__c

    FROM (
        SELECT 
            ManagerEmployeeNumber,
            CountryCode,
            Title,
            manager,
            LastModifiedDate,
            UUID
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                u.ManagerEmployeeNumber,
                u.CountryCode,
                u.Title,
                m.id AS manager,
                u.LastModifiedDate,
                u.UUID,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY u.UUID 
                    ORDER BY u.LastModifiedDate DESC, COALESCE(m.id, 0) DESC
                ) AS rn
            FROM URTL u
            LEFT JOIN UserManagerId m 
                ON u.ManagerEmployeeNumber = m.EmployeeNumber
        ) t
        WHERE rn = 1
    ) urtl

    JOIN sf_users_staging sf
        ON urtl.UUID = sf.Red_Hat_UUID__c
        AND urtl.UUID IS NOT NULL
        AND sf.Red_Hat_UUID__c IS NOT NULL

    GROUP BY 
        urtl.UUID,
        sf.Id,
        sf.ManagerId,
        sf.CountryCode,
        sf.Title,
        urtl.LastModifiedDate,
        sf.EmployeeNumber,
        sf.Business_Card_Title__c

) changes

WHERE 
      urtl_title IS NOT NULL
   OR urtl_manager IS NOT NULL
   OR urtl_countrycode IS NOT NULL;

block.name: query_list

input.result_schema_json: [{"name":"Id","type":"string","optional":false,"control_type":"text","label":"ID"},{"control_type":"text","label":"UUID","name":"uuid","type":"string","optional":false},{"control_type":"text","label":"SF Manager ID","name":"sf_managerId","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"Source Manager ID","name":"source_manager_id","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"SF Country Code","name":"sf_countryCode","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"Source Country Code","name":"source_country_code","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"SF Title","name":"sf_title","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"Source Title","name":"source_title","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"SF Business Card Title","name":"sf_Business_Card_Title__c","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"Source Business Card Title","name":"source_business_card_title","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"SF Employee Number","name":"sf_employeeNumber","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"Source Employee Number","name":"source_employee_number","type":"string","optional":true}]
input.sql:
SELECT
	t.Id,
    t.uuid,

    t.sf_managerId,
    t.manager_id AS source_manager_id,

    t.sf_countryCode,
    t.country_code AS source_country_code,

    t.sf_title,
    t.title AS source_title,

    t.sf_Business_Card_Title__c,
    t.business_card_title AS source_business_card_title,

    t.sf_employeeNumber,
    t.employee_number AS source_employee_number

FROM
(
    SELECT
        x.*
    FROM
    (
        /* LDAP records always take priority */
        SELECT
      		Id,
            uuid,
            lastmodifieddate,
            ldap_managerID AS manager_id,
            ldap_countrycode AS country_code,
            ldap_title AS title,
            ldap_BusinessCardTitle AS business_card_title,
            ldap_employeeNumber AS employee_number,
            sf_managerId,
            sf_countryCode,
            sf_title,
            sf_Business_Card_Title__c,
            sf_employeeNumber
        FROM LDAP_updates

        UNION ALL

        /* Use URTL only if UUID does not exist in LDAP */
        SELECT
      		u.Id,
            u.uuid,
            u.urtl_lastmodifieddate AS lastmodifieddate,
            u.urtl_managerID AS manager_id,
            u.urtl_countrycode AS country_code,
            u.urtl_title AS title,
            NULL AS business_card_title,
            NULL AS employee_number,
            u.sf_managerId,
            u.sf_countryCode,
            u.sf_title,
            u.sf_Business_Card_Title__c,
            u.sf_employeeNumber
        FROM URTL_updates u
        WHERE NOT EXISTS
        (
            SELECT 1
            FROM LDAP_updates l
            WHERE l.uuid = u.uuid
        )

    ) x

    INNER JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            uuid,
            MAX(lastmodifieddate) AS max_lastmodifieddate
        FROM
        (
            /* LDAP always included */
            SELECT
                uuid,
                lastmodifieddate
            FROM LDAP_updates

            UNION ALL

            /* URTL only when UUID absent in LDAP */
            SELECT
                u.uuid,
                u.urtl_lastmodifieddate AS lastmodifieddate
            FROM URTL_updates u
            WHERE NOT EXISTS
            (
                SELECT 1
                FROM LDAP_updates l
                WHERE l.uuid = u.uuid
            )

        ) u
        GROUP BY uuid
    ) m
      ON x.uuid = m.uuid
     AND x.lastmodifieddate = m.max_lastmodifieddate

) t

WHERE
      COALESCE(t.sf_managerId, '') <> COALESCE(t.manager_id, '')
   OR COALESCE(t.sf_countryCode, '') <> COALESCE(t.country_code, '')
   OR COALESCE(t.sf_title, '') <> COALESCE(t.title, '')
   OR COALESCE(t.sf_Business_Card_Title__c, '') <> COALESCE(t.business_card_title, '')
   OR COALESCE(t.sf_employeeNumber, '') <> COALESCE(t.employee_number, '');

block.comment: Query for final Updates from LDAP & URTL
